raw_cv_text:
Kevin Jawad
+44 20 7946 0958 | Email: kevin.jawad@outlook.com | LinkedIn: kevin-jawad | GitHub: KevinJawad | https://kevinjawad.dev
EDUCATION
University of Cambridge | MSc Computer Science 2009 - 2011
Graduated with Distinction; thesis on optimizing client-side rendering pipelines received departmental recognition
Led the Computer Science Society as President, organizing weekly technical seminars attended by 150+ members
University of Manchester | BSc Computer Science (First Class Honours) 2005 - 2009
Achieved top 5% of cohort; awarded Computer Science Prize for academic excellence
Founded the Web Development Club, growing membership from 12 to 120+ active students in 2 years
EXPERIENCE
Stripe | Principal Frontend Engineer 2021 - Present
Led architectural redesign of Stripe Dashboard resulting in 45% reduction in page load times and enabling 8 million+
monthly active users
Established frontend excellence standards across 40+ engineers, reducing production incidents by 62% YoY through code
review frameworks and testing protocols
Mentored 12 senior engineers through architectural decision-making, with 3 promoted to staff-level positions within 18
months
Figma | Senior Staff Frontend Engineer 2018 - 2021
Architected real-time collaborative editor performance layer, enabling simultaneous editing for 50,000+ users with
<200ms latency
Drove migration of 2.5M lines of legacy code from Coffeescript to TypeScript, improving type safety and reducing bugs
by 58%
Implemented advanced caching and incremental rendering system that decreased bundle size by 34% and improved Time
to Interactive by 3.2 seconds
Datadog | Staff Frontend Engineer 2015 - 2018
Designed and built observability dashboard platform handling 12 trillion data points monthly with sub-100ms query
response times
Scaled frontend team from 6 to 24 engineers by establishing mentorship program and technical standards, increasing
delivery velocity by 180%
Pioneered WebWorker-based performance optimization, reducing main thread blocking by 71% and improving user
satisfaction scores by 42%
Palantir Technologies | Senior Frontend Engineer 2012 - 2015
Engineered geospatial visualization layer supporting real-time analysis for 500+ enterprise customers, processing 2.5
petabytes of data
Led cross-functional initiative to implement accessibility standards (WCAG 2.1 AA), increasing user base by 28% among
accessibility-dependent users
Developed reactive state management framework adopted across 15+ product teams, reducing development time by 35%
and cutting runtime memory usage by 44%
ThoughtWorks | Senior Consultant - Frontend Engineering 2011 - 2012
Architected responsive web application for leading financial services client, scaling from 100K to 2.3M daily active users
within 8 months
Mentored team of 5 junior developers on modern JavaScript frameworks and test-driven development, improving code
coverage from 18% to 88%
Pioneered continuous deployment pipeline that reduced release cycle from 3 weeks to 2 hours, enabling 150+ production
deployments monthly
PROJECTS
VectorFlow | TypeScript, WebGL, WebAssembly, React 2020 - 2022
Built open-source 2D/3D rendering engine for data visualization with 2.8K GitHub stars, achieving 60fps performance on
1M+ data points
Optimized WebAssembly bindings reducing initialization time from 850ms to 120ms, enabling instant interactive
visualizations in production apps
AccessibilityAI | React, Node.js, Machine Learning, ARIA 2019 - Present
Developed AI-powered accessibility testing framework that automatically detects WCAG 2.1 violations, adopted by 400+
organizations and scanning 50M+ web pages
Implemented automated remediation suggestions covering 87% of common accessibility issues, reducing manual testing
time by 76% for enterprise clients
EXTRACURRICULAR
React Europe Conference | Speaker & Program Committee Member 2018 - Present
Delivered keynote talks reaching 3,000+ attendees on scaling frontend architecture at hypergrowth companies, generating
200K+ views on YouTube
Curated technical track attracting top 5% of submission proposals, improving conference quality score from 4.2 to 4.8 out
of 5 stars
Open Source Frontend Community | Core Contributor & Maintainer 2015 - Present
Maintain 4 high-impact open-source projects with combined 45K+ GitHub stars, averaging 30+ pull requests merged
monthly and mentoring 25+ contributors
Established contributor covenant and onboarding documentation, increasing new contributor retention rate from 22% to
71% over 3 years
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), Python, SQL, HTML5, CSS3, WebAssembly
Technologies – React, Vue.js, Next.js, GraphQL, WebGL, Three.js, Node.js, Redux, Webpack, Vite, Testing Library, Jest,
Cypress, WebSockets, Service Workers
Tools – Git, GitHub, GitLab, VS Code, Chrome DevTools, Lighthouse, Figma, Jira, Docker, AWS (S3, CloudFront, Lambda),
Datadog, Sentry
